description: A customer wants to set up a recurring monthly transfer of $500 from their checking to their savings account.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the source and destination accounts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer's checking and savings accounts.

nodes.task_description: Collect the details for the recurring transfer: amount, frequency, and start date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the transfer details ($500, monthly, starting next month).

nodes.task_description: Create the recurring transfer in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the automated transfer and provides a confirmation.
